name: Barbecued Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons frozen orange juice concentrate, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat chicken pieces dry so seasoning coats well; set aside.
2. Combine seasoning mix ingredients; sprinkle generously over both sides of the chicken. Reserve 1 tablespoon mix for sauce and store leftovers in a covered container.
3. Grill chicken, skin side down, uncovered, over medium coals for 20 minutes.
4. Turn chicken pieces; grill 20 to 30 minutes more or until chicken is tender and no longer pink.
5. Meanwhile, combine all sauce ingredients in a small bowl.
6. During the last 10 minutes of grilling, brush chicken often with sauce.
